query: SELECT awayTeam, homeTeam, awayML, homeML, mlAwayBetsPct, mlAwayMoneyPct, spreadAwayBetsPct, spreadAwayMoneyPct, totalOverBetsPct, totalOverMoneyPct, gameDate FROM games WHERE sport = 'NBA' AND awayML IS NOT NULL ORDER BY gameDate, sortOrder LIMIT 6;
